title: Smoky Apple Crisp
description: A warm and comforting dessert featuring tender apples, a crunchy oat topping, and a hint of smokiness.
instructions: Peel, core, and slice the apples.
In a large bowl, mix together the sliced apples, brown sugar, and smoky dutch spice blend.
Transfer the apple mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the oats, a pinch of salt, and a drizzle of water to create a crumbly topping.
Spread the oat topping evenly over the apple mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Serve warm, topped with vanilla ice cream if desired.
